title: App Settings - General - About - New update available
scenario: App Update flow from General > About shows version info, Release Notes link, and Update button redirecting to app store
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) in the top-left corner.
4. Observe the About screen when an app update is available on the cloud.
6. Tap the 'X' button to close the Release Notes view.
expected:
1. The About screen displays: \"App Updates Needed\" text, an \"Update\" button, current and available firmware versions, and a link to Release Notes.
2. Tapping the Release Notes link opens the Poly Lens Mobile release notes page showing latest and older version info.
3. Tapping the \"X\" button returns the user to the General section with the About tab expanded.
4. Tapping the \"Update\" button opens the app store page for Poly Lens.
